competitor_changes: audit trail export: PDF with digital signature
real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC via Open Banking API)
multi-currency invoicing (80+ currencies including EUR, GBP, USD native)
current_tool_status: No native multi-currency — EUR invoices require manual conversion and journal entries
Reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows takes 8–12 minutes; causes month-end bottleneck
Revenue recognition module not IFRS 15 compliant — workaround in use
No real-time bank feed for Barclays Business accounts (only overnight sync)
Audit trail export is CSV only — external auditors have requested PDF with digital signature
compliance_changes: PayTrek offers GDPR Data Processing Agreement, VaultLedger does not meet Meridian's UK GDPR obligations for EU client data due to US data residency
notes: PayTrek has limitations on EU data residency and pricing increases if payment volume exceeds £500k/month
